name: PM-MUDRA
target_description: Non-farm sector micro and small enterprises — proprietorships, partnerships, companies, shopkeepers, vendors, artisans, food processors, transport operators
ministry: Ministry of Finance (Department of Financial Services)
data_source: PMMY official scheme details from mudra.org.in and myscheme.gov.in

rules.description: Applicant must be at least 18 years of age
Applicant must have or intend to start a non-farm micro enterprise
rules.ambiguity_note: Manufacturing, trading, service or allied-agriculture micro enterprise. NOT core farming.

rules.description: Applicant must not be a defaulter to any bank or financial institution
rules.ambiguity_note: Must not be a defaulter to any bank or financial institution. Satisfactory credit track record required.

rules.description: Applicant should have an Aadhaar card

benefit_summary: Shishu: up to ₹50,000 (no collateral). Kishore: ₹50,001-₹5 lakh. Tarun: ₹5-₹10 lakh. Tarun Plus: up to ₹20 lakh (for successful Tarun repayers).

application_offices.find_instruction: Any scheduled commercial bank (SBI, PNB, Bank of Baroda, etc.)

description: Collateral-free loans for non-farm micro and small enterprises under three tiers: Shishu (up to ₹50,000 for new businesses), Kishore (₹50,001–₹5 lakh for expanding businesses), and Tarun/Tarun+ (₹5 lakh–₹20 lakh for well-established businesses). Available through all scheduled banks, MFIs, and NBFCs. No processing fee charged.
description_hindi: छोटे और सूक्ष्म व्यवसाय के लिए बिना गिरवी के ऋण: शिशु (₹50,000 तक — नए व्यवसाय), किशोर (₹50,001–₹5 लाख — बढ़ते व्यवसाय), तरुण/तरुण+ (₹5 लाख–₹20 लाख — स्थापित व्यवसाय)। सभी बैंकों, MFI और NBFC से मिलता है। कोई प्रोसेसिंग शुल्क नहीं। खेती को छोड़कर सभी व्यवसायों के लिए।
benefit_summary_hindi: ₹50,000–₹20 लाख ऋण, बिना गिरवी, तीन चरणों में (शिशु, किशोर, तरुण)
